pr-evidence/storage-uri-handoff-writer/e.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the committed diff with no blocking findings; reviewer ran adapter, storage, engine-probe, public-package, and diff-check verification and noted only that live Databricks /dbfs or /Volumes mounts were not exercised.
scope: document_kv_cache.engine_adapters, engine adapter tests, README engine-handoff documentation
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_adapters.py -q; poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_adapters.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
what_changed: Make engine adapter handoff JSON writing resolve storage-style output paths through local_path.
pr-evidence/storage-uri-handoff-writer/e.why: Databricks and serving connectors need handoff records written beside local-NVMe, DBFS, or Unity Catalog payloads; the reader and probe/action writers already normalize those URI forms, but write_engine_adapter_request_json previously treated them as raw Path values.
